mapper.select: select t_b_tool_base.id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_base.name as tool_base_name, t_b_tool_base.platform as tool_base_platform, t_b_tool_base.create_time as tool_base_create_time, t_b_tool_base.update_time as tool_base_update_time, t_b_tool_base.deleted as tool_base_deleted, t_b_tool_base.version as tool_base_version, trtbds.base_version as tool_base_base_version, tbtds.id as tool_base_source_id, tbtds.data as tool_base_source_data, tbtds.create_time as tool_base_source_create_time, tbtds.update_time as tool_base_source_update_time, tbtds.deleted as tool_base_source_delete, tbtds.version as tool_base_source_version from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbds on trtbds.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbds.data_type = 'SOURCE' and trtbds.base_version = #{version} left join t_b_tool_data as tbtds on tbtds.deleted = 0 and tbtds.id = trtbds.data_id where t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_base.id = #{id}

select tool_base_id, tool_base_name, tool_base_platform, tool_base_create_time, tool_base_update_time, tool_base_deleted, tool_base_version, tool_base_base_version, tool_base_source_id, tool_base_source_data, tool_base_source_create_time, tool_base_source_update_time, tool_base_source_delete, tool_base_source_version from (select t_b_tool_base.id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_base.name as tool_base_name, t_b_tool_base.platform as tool_base_platform, t_b_tool_base.create_time as tool_base_create_time, t_b_tool_base.update_time as tool_base_update_time, t_b_tool_base.deleted as tool_base_deleted, t_b_tool_base.version as tool_base_version, trtbds.base_version as tool_base_base_version, tbtds.id as tool_base_source_id, tbtds.data as tool_base_source_data, tbtds.create_time as tool_base_source_create_time, tbtds.update_time as tool_base_source_update_time, tbtds.deleted as tool_base_source_delete, tbtds.version as tool_base_source_version, row_number() over (partition by t_b_tool_base.id order by trtbds.id desc) as rn from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbds on trtbds.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbds.data_type = 'SOURCE' and trtbds.base_version != 0 left join t_b_tool_data as tbtds on tbtds.deleted = 0 and tbtds.id = trtbds.data_id where t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_base.id = #{id}) temp where temp.rn = 1

select tool_base_base_version from (select trtbds.base_version as tool_base_base_version, row_number() over (partition by t_b_tool_base.id order by trtbds.id desc) as rn from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbds on trtbds.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbds.data_type = 'SOURCE' and trtbds.base_version != 0 where t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_base.id = #{id}) temp where temp.rn = 1

select t_b_tool_base.id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_base.name as tool_base_name, t_b_tool_base.platform as tool_base_platform, t_b_tool_base.create_time as tool_base_create_time, t_b_tool_base.update_time as tool_base_update_time, t_b_tool_base.deleted as tool_base_deleted, t_b_tool_base.version as tool_base_version, trtbdd.base_version as tool_base_base_version, tbtdd.data as tool_base_dist_data from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbdd on trtbdd.deleted = 0 and trtbdd.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbdd.data_type = 'DIST' and trtbdd.base_version = #{version} left join t_b_tool_data as tbtdd on tbtdd.deleted = 0 and tbtdd.id = trtbdd.data_id where t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_base.id = #{id}

select t_b_tool_base.id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_base.name as tool_base_name, t_b_tool_base.platform as tool_base_platform, t_b_tool_base.create_time as tool_base_create_time, t_b_tool_base.update_time as tool_base_update_time, t_b_tool_base.deleted as tool_base_deleted, t_b_tool_base.version as tool_base_version, trtbds.base_version as tool_base_base_version from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbds on trtbds.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbds.data_type = 'SOURCE' and trtbds.base_version != 0
and t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0
#{item}
order by trtbds.base_version desc

select tool_base_id, tool_base_name, tool_base_platform, tool_base_create_time, tool_base_update_time, tool_base_deleted, tool_base_version, tool_base_base_version from (select t_b_tool_base.id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_base.name as tool_base_name, t_b_tool_base.platform as tool_base_platform, t_b_tool_base.create_time as tool_base_create_time, t_b_tool_base.update_time as tool_base_update_time, t_b_tool_base.deleted as tool_base_deleted, t_b_tool_base.version as tool_base_version, trtbds.base_version as tool_base_base_version, row_number() over (partition by t_b_tool_base.id order by trtbds.base_version desc) as rn from t_b_tool_base left join t_r_tool_base_data as trtbds on trtbds.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_id = t_b_tool_base.id and trtbds.data_type = 'SOURCE' and trtbds.base_version != 0 where t_b_tool_base.deleted = 0 and trtbds.base_version is not null) temp where temp.rn = 1
